title: Locator Name Tags
description: This mod adds the nicknames of the players who own the markers above the markers on the locator.
body:
**Recently, I released a mod that simplifies movement in the game.**
**Details:** https://modrinth.com/mod/better-movement-(fabric)


This mod adds nickname rendering above the markers from the recently added locator. It's useful if you want to go to a **specific player**.
![Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/07cec1ad66db45ee8b2d51f3791b31c15ae6484b.png)
